preferredDeck: Renderer recovery, semantic content enrichment, unified AI provider settings, and read-on-scroll fixes
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Freed Desktop now rebuilds the main window after renderer stalls
Feed items now mark read while scrolling
Provider health persistence no longer uses the Tauri store mutex path that could freeze Freed Desktop shortly after launch
